sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $760,000 of APPLIED MATERIALS INC lobbying was just disclosed

feed.title: Welltower’s UK Senior Care Deals Reshape Growth And Risk Profile

Investors are now focused on the integration and stabilization of these UK assets, monitoring their contribution to Welltower's broader healthcare real estate platform and considering potential risks such as concentration and currency fluctuations.

feed.title: Ameriprise Financial Data Breach Lawsuit Investigation
feed.summary: Shamis & Gentile P.A. is investigating a data breach at Ameriprise Financial, Inc., which affected 47,876 individuals after an unauthorized person accessed stored data on March 18, 2026. The company reported the breach to the Maine Attorney General and began notifying affected individuals on April 17, 2026. Those whose personal information was exposed may be entitled to compensation and are encouraged to submit a claim for investigation.

feed.title: Hoth Therapeutics Is A High-Risk Biotech Betting On Trial Milestones
feed.summary: Hoth Therapeutics (NASDAQ: HOTH) is a clinical-stage biotech with no product revenue, making its value dependent on successful clinical trial results for its pipeline, including HT-001 and HT-KIT. The company recently completed a $0.70 registered direct offering to fund operations, which provides near-term liquidity but also dilutes existing shareholders. Hoth is considered a high-risk, milestone-driven investment, suitable for risk-tolerant investors looking for speculative upside tied to successful trial readouts and potential partnering deals.

feed.title: Boston Scientific Advances Fainting Detection Study With New Wearable Data Initiative
feed.summary: Boston Scientific (BSX) has provided an update on its ARISE study, focused on detecting and providing early warning for fainting disorders using wearable data. The observational study will utilize skin-worn Holter monitors to link blood pressure-related fainting events with symptoms, aiming to improve detection and patient care. While patient enrollment has not yet begun, the updated protocol signifies Boston Scientific's commitment to advancing connected cardiac monitoring and data-driven health solutions, positioning the company for long-term growth in digital health, even if direct revenue impact is years away.

feed.title: SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust Rises Amid Tech Strength
feed.summary: The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust ($SPY) has increased by 2.02% over the past week despite a net outflow of $101.12 million, largely influenced by the strong performance of its major tech holdings. Nvidia, Apple, and Microsoft are key contributors to this rise, driven by AI advancements, strategic business expansions, and positive analyst ratings. Nvidia plans to restart RTX 3060 production and continues to lead in AI chips, while Apple's U.S. manufacturing efforts and strong performance in China, along with a rating upgrade, garnered investor interest. Microsoft's accelerated AI strategy, including new data centers and Copilot adoption, also boosted its stock despite heavy AI infrastructure investment.

feed.title: ENPH Deadline: Rosen Law Firm Urges Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH) Stockholders with Losses in Excess of $100K to Contact the Firm for Information About Their Rights
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm is urging Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH) stockholders who incurred losses exceeding $100,000 to contact them regarding a class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Enphase made false and misleading statements about its ability to manage inventory and mitigate effects from the termination of the Residential Clean Energy Credit, leading to overstated financial prospects. The deadline for stockholders to seek to be appointed lead plaintiff is April 30, 2026.

feed.title: The US State With The Most Costco Locations Per Capita Has Ties To Its Roots
feed.summary: Washington state boasts the highest number of Costco locations per capita in the US, with one warehouse for every 217,571 residents, largely due to its historical significance as the birthplace of Costco. The first Costco warehouse opened in Seattle in 1983, founded by Jim Sinegal and Jeff Brotman. The company's strong ties to Washington are also reflected in its Kirkland signature brand, named after Kirkland, Washington, where its original headquarters was located.

feed.title: ENPH Deadline: Rosen Law Firm Urges Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH) Stockholders with Losses in Excess of $100K to Contact the Firm for Information About Their Rights
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm is notifying stockholders of Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH) who experienced losses greater than $100,000 to contact them regarding a class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Enphase made false and misleading statements about its ability to manage channel inventory and mitigate effects from the termination of the Residential Clean Energy Credit, overstating its financial prospects. Investors who purchased securities between April 22, 2025, and October 28, 2025, have until April 20, 2026, to file motions to serve as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: S&P affirms Vista Global B+ rating based on operating performance
feed.summary: S&P Global has affirmed Vista Global's B+ issuer credit rating with a negative outlook, noting that while operating performance in 2025 was broadly as expected, high leverage and refinancing risk remain concerns. The rating agency forecasts increased EBITDA for Vista Global in 2026 and 2027, expecting improved credit metrics, but maintains a negative outlook due to the risk of the company not restoring credit ratios consistent with a B+ rating. Vista Global reported $2.9 billion in revenue in 2025 and plans to increase its Challenger fleet while disposing of older aircraft.

feed.title: Nimbus acquires 3M’s Precision Grinding & Finishing
feed.summary: Nimbus has acquired 3M's Precision Grinding & Finishing (PG&F) business, which will now operate as Winterthur Technology Group. This move aims to establish the company as an independent entity focused on innovation and high-performance solutions in the bonded abrasives market. Edmar Allitsch, former CEO of Winterthur Technologie AG, has been appointed CEO of the newly formed group.

feed.title: Glaukos’ Epioxa for keratoconus receives permanent J-code effective July 1, 2026
feed.summary: Glaukos Corporation announced that the US Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS) has assigned a permanent Healthcare Common Procedure Coding System (HCPCS) J-code (J2789) for its Epioxa HD / Epioxa therapy, used for treating keratoconus. This J-code, effective July 1, 2026, is expected to streamline billing and reimbursement processes, improving patient access to the recently approved and commercialized treatment. Epioxa is a topical, epithelium-on corneal collagen cross-linking therapy that uses oxygen-enriched riboflavin activated by UV light to strengthen the cornea, offering an incision-free alternative to traditional methods.

feed.title: Monthly Dividend Check at Risk: What GAIN Investors Should Watch Right Now
feed.summary: Gladstone Investment Corporation (GAIN) pays a monthly dividend with a 6% yield, but its adjusted net investment income coverage has recently tightened, falling below the distribution threshold in the last quarter. This is primarily due to yield compression from Fed rate cuts, although the company has a spillover income buffer and contractual floors on new deals to somewhat protect the distribution. Investors should monitor the upcoming earnings report for clearer signs of stabilization or deterioration.
